  "findings": [
    "Unauthorized addition of water to the concrete mix on site (slump manipulation) without engineering approval or verification of water-cement ratio limits."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt the concrete placement.",
    "Reject the affected concrete batch/truck.",
    "Perform slump and cylinder testing if any manipulated concrete was already placed.",
    "Verify water-cement ratio limits with the batch ticket and design specifications before resuming with a compliant batch."
  ],
  "rationale": "Adding water on site without strict engineering controls and recalculation of the water-cement ratio violates ACI standards, drastically reduces the compressive strength, increases shrinkage/cracking potential, and compromises the structural integrity of the industrial concrete element.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 (Specifications for Structural Concrete)",
    "ACI 304R (Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete)"
  ]
}
